core_model.structure_summary: A parameterized algebraic map that forms a normalized (row-sum-to-one) weighting from a bilinear product of two input matrices and applies it to a third matrix, optionally as a concatenation of several parallel such maps.

variables.meaning: scaling constant normalizing the bilinear score

notes: This is a survey paper with no central mathematical model of its own; the only display equations are the standard scaled dot-product attention and multi-head attention maps, which are cited background architecture rather than a result the paper proves. I report the attention map as the nominal core but with low confidence per the instruction to use <0.5 when the paper has no clear central model.
